# IT in DE — German IT Job Market Dashboard

> Interactive dashboard analyzing 19,000+ German IT job postings from LinkedIn and Indeed.

## About

This site provides data-driven analysis of the German IT job market. All data comes from ~19,000 real job postings scraped from LinkedIn and Indeed in late 2025, covering 42 IT job families across all 16 German federal states.

## Key Facts

- **19,000+** job postings analyzed
- **42** IT job families (Frontend, Backend, Fullstack, Data Scientist, Data Engineer, DevOps, etc.)
- **1,100+** cities covered
- **16** German federal states mapped
- **Top skills**: Python, CI/CD, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, JavaScript, SQL, AWS, Java, TypeScript
- **~24%** of postings offer remote work
- **~2%** of postings include salary data (salary transparency is low in Germany)
- **Data sources**: LinkedIn and Indeed

## Pages

- `/` — Market overview: total jobs, job family distribution, monthly trends, top cities
- `/skills` — Skills demand: top 25 skills, skills-by-role heatmap, co-occurrence matrix, required vs nice-to-have
- `/salary` — Salary analysis by role, seniority, and city (limited to 2% of postings with salary data)
- `/location` — Geographic distribution: interactive Germany map, jobs per state, modality by region
- `/remote` — Remote work analysis: modality split by role and seniority
- `/seniority` — Seniority levels and experience distribution by role
- `/benefits` — Benefit categories by role (time off, flexible hours, retirement, health, etc.)
- `/languages` — Language requirements: German necessity by role, CEFR levels, English-only roles
- `/education` — Education levels and soft skill categories by role
- `/companies` — Top hiring companies and their role diversity
- `/roles` — Deep dives into 6 target roles with skill progression
- `/personas` — Job seeker guide with 4 persona profiles
- `/explore` — Advanced tools: salary estimator, no-German job finder, skill combos, role comparison

## Contact
